# Dr. Michael A. Weintraub, MD

Triple board-certified physician (endocrinology, internal medicine, obesity medicine). Co-Chair of the Endocrine Society guideline on pharmacologic management of obesity. Faculty Director of the New England Journal of Medicine Group's "Advancing Obesity Care" course. Clinical researcher focused on GLP-1 therapies and metabolic disease. Practices in New York City at NYU Langone.

Website: https://michaelweintraubmd.com/

## Areas of expertise

- Obesity medicine and obesity pharmacotherapy
- GLP-1 receptor agonists (semaglutide, tirzepatide, orforglipron, liraglutide) — mechanism, efficacy, safety, discontinuation, access
- Type 2 diabetes management
- Metabolic health and weight management
- Endocrinology — thyroid, adrenal, pituitary disorders
- Clinical research in obesity and endocrinology

## Available for

- **Media interviews and expert commentary** — television, podcasts, print, and digital outlets. Responsive to same-day requests on breaking news in obesity, GLP-1s, and endocrinology.
- **Pharmaceutical industry consulting** — advisory boards, scientific advisory roles, speakers bureau engagements, medical affairs consulting, and drug development input for obesity and metabolic disease programs.
- **Continuing medical education (CME)** — lectures, course faculty, conference speaking, panel moderation.
- **Research collaboration** — investigator-initiated studies, industry-sponsored trials, and co-authorship on clinical or review work in obesity pharmacotherapy and endocrinology.

## Credentials

- Board certified: Endocrinology, Diabetes & Metabolism (ABIM); Obesity Medicine (ABOM); Internal Medicine (ABIM)
- Fellowship: NewYork-Presbyterian / Weill Cornell Medical Center + Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center
- Residency: Thomas Jefferson University Hospital
- Medical school: Rutgers Robert Wood Johnson Medical School
- Undergraduate: University of Pennsylvania / The Wharton School
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9599-9184
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=G9qngpQAAAAJ&hl=en
- PubMed: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=Weintraub+MA%5BAuthor%5D

## Leadership roles

- Co-Chair, Endocrine Society pharmacologic management of obesity guideline update
- Faculty Director, NEJM Group "Advancing Obesity Care" course
- Exam Writing Committee, American Board of Obesity Medicine
- Lecturer, Columbia Cornell Obesity Etiology, Prevention and Treatment (2026)

## Media coverage

Featured on NBC News, TIME Magazine, Medscape, CNBC, CBS News, STAT News, Reuters, The Verge, Wired, HCPLive, Gizmodo, Business Insider, Yahoo Finance, New York Post, Clinical Advisor, Sirius XM Doctor Radio, Core Internal Medicine Podcast, Endocrine News Podcast, and more. Full list with dates and links: https://michaelweintraubmd.com/press.html

## Publications

Peer-reviewed publications in Lancet Diabetes and Endocrinology, Journal of Clinical Endocrinology and Metabolism, Clinical Journal of the American Society of Nephrology, Chest, Breast Cancer Research and Treatment, Obesity, and others. Full list: https://michaelweintraubmd.com/publications.html

## Practice

NYU Langone Diabetes & Endocrine Associates
222 East 41st Street, 23rd Floor
New York, NY 10017
